app.heroSubtitle: Connect your GoMining session and generate a complete all-rewards Excel report in one click. Your token never leaves your browser.
app.rateLimitsNotice: This app currently runs on free-tier services (Cloudflare, CoinGecko, FX Rates API). If a request fails due to rate limits, wait a moment and try again, or try again tomorrow.
app.unofficialNotice: This is an unofficial tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the GoMining team.
app.openSourceNotice: This app and extension were built with security and transparency in mind. The full source code is publicly available and accessible to anyone who wants to inspect it before using it.
app.sheetsToFetch: {{fetch}} sheet(s) will be fetched. {{stored}} stored, will be probed for updates first.
app.allSheetsStored: All sheets stored. Will probe for updates before building.

auth.compatible: Compatible with Chrome, Opera and Orion (Mobile iOS).
auth.step1: Open GoMining and click the extension icon
auth.step2: Click 'Sync to Exporter' when the extension shows 'Ready to sync.'
auth.step3: Once synced, the extension shows 'Hello [name] 👋' and 'Profile synced.'
auth.step4: Click 'Open Exporter' and you will be redirected here
auth.latestVersion: Make sure you have the latest version of the extension.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sync again via the extension.
auth.tokenInvalid: Extension token is invalid or expired.
auth.noToken: No token found. Please sync via the RewardTrackr extension first.

dataViewer.noData: No cached data for this sheet. Export it first from the main panel.
dataViewer.newStructure: This table has a new structure. Please re-export to load the updated data.
dataViewer.noFilterResults: No results for the selected filters.
dataViewer.kwhCostNote: kWh cost: GoMining uses the project average over the billing period ($0.05–$0.07/kWh).
dataViewer.maintenanceUsdNote: Maintenance is always calculated in USD and then converted to the selected currency.

export.walletPricingDesc: Applies only to Bounties, Deposits, Withdrawals and Transactions. GoMining API does not return fiat pricing for these sheets, so we enrich them using CoinGecko during export.
export.includeFiatPricing: Include fiat pricing (USD). Extra fiat is configured below.
export.rateLimitWarning: This can take some time. CoinGecko free plan has rate limits, and each limit hit triggers a 60s cooldown.
export.includeExtraConversion: Include extra conversion column (USD is always included)
export.cacheCleared: Cache cleared. Next export will fetch fresh data.
export.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please re-sync via the RewardTrackr extension.
export.skippedPending: {{name}}: Skipped {{count}} pending reinvestment entr(y/ies), will retry on next export.
export.limitReached: Export limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.
export.requestTimeout:
GoMining API request timed out. Retrying in {{remaining}}s (attempt {{attempt}}/{{max}}).
This may be a temporary GoMining-side issue.
export.loadingPageNew: {{name}}: Loading page {{page}} ({{count}} new records so far)...
export.networkError: Network error: Failed to reach the GoMining API. Please try again later or report the issue [here](https://github.com/JoseGouveia9/RewardTrackr/issues).

share.publiclyVisible: Your records will be publicly visible. Anyone with the link can view them, read-only.
share.communityPublic: Your profile will appear in the public community list.
share.communityPrivate: Your profile stays accessible only by direct link.
share.workerRequired: Sharing requires a Cloudflare Worker. See {{link}}.
share.updateWarning: This will update the data of your shared link with the currently selected options.
share.communitySubtitle: Shared profiles from RewardTrackr users. Click any row to view their records.
share.noProfiles: No shared profiles yet. Be the first!

support.tipsDescription: Tips help cover API costs and keep this tool free and unrestricted. Tip via crypto below.

cycleTracker.warnBtcFundZero:
Your league BTC fund is currently 0. MinerWars estimate will show 0 until the fund starts being filled.
Try refreshing tomorrow once the first day of the cycle has been funded.
cycleTracker.warnNoClanAnalyticsLive: No clan analytics (clan may be <30 days old) — using current clan power for all rounds. Estimation may be over/under-inflated.
cycleTracker.warnNoClanAnalyticsDone: No clan analytics (clan may be <30 days old) — using clan power at cycle end for all rounds. Estimation may be over/under-inflated.
cycleTracker.warnZeroedRounds: The following blocks were excluded from maintenance because maintenance exceeded the estimated reward:

about.title: About RewardTrackr
about.subtitle: An unofficial GoMining companion tool
about.whatIsP1: RewardTrackr is a free, source-available browser tool that lets GoMining users export and analyse their reward history. It connects directly to the GoMining API using your personal access token stored temporarily in your browser session (sessionStorage), and organises your data into a structured Excel spreadsheet you can download and keep.
about.whatIsP2: RewardTrackr does not use its own backend to process or store your reward records. Most data remains in your browser unless you explicitly export or share it.
about.feature1: Export Solo Mining, MinerWars, Bounties, Simple Earn, Referrals, Ambassador, Deposits, Withdrawals, and Transactions
about.feature2: Incremental sync: only fetches new records since your last export
about.feature3: BTC price enrichment via CoinGecko for historical USD/EUR values
about.feature4: Extra fiat currency columns (EUR, GBP, and more)
about.feature6: Light and dark theme, multi-language support
about.feature7: MinerWars Cycle Tracker: compare estimated and actual rewards per cycle, with maintenance breakdown and clan targets
about.licenseP1: The complete source code, including client-side logic and supporting infrastructure such as the rate-limit worker, is publicly available under a
about.licenseP1b: . You are free to inspect the code and report issues.
about.authorP1: Built and maintained by José Gouveia (Moustachio). RewardTrackr is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to GoMining or any of its related entities.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noCollectionP1: RewardTrackr does not collect, store, or sell your reward data or personal account data for analytics or profiling purposes. There is no account system, no analytics, and no telemetry. Your reward records and preferences stay in your browser. Limited technical data is processed solely for operational purposes such as rate limiting and API functionality, as described below.
privacy.browserStorageTitle: What is stored in your browser
privacy.browserStorageP1: All data RewardTrackr uses is stored locally in your browser.
privacy.sessionItem1: Your GoMining API access token, stored in sessionStorage and used solely to authenticate requests directly to the GoMining API on your behalf. Cleared automatically when the browser tab or session is closed.
privacy.localItem1: Cached reward records from your last sync, to support faster incremental exports
privacy.localItem2: Cached market and exchange rate data, to avoid redundant network calls
privacy.localItem3: Your synced GoMining account alias, retained across sessions for display purposes
privacy.browserStorageP2: Data remains in your browser unless you explicitly export or share it. You can remove stored data at any time by clearing your browser's site data or using the in-app 'Clear cache' option.
privacy.securityP1: Your API token is stored only in your browser's session storage (sessionStorage) and is transmitted directly to the GoMining API for reward retrieval. Limited technical requests related to rate limiting may be processed by project-operated infrastructure, as described below. Browser storage may still be accessible to scripts running on the page or anyone with access to your device. Use RewardTrackr only on trusted devices and keep your browser secure.
privacy.externalRequestsP1: RewardTrackr makes requests to the following services:
privacy.externalItem1: RewardTrackr rate-limit and stats service (Cloudflare Worker): when you start an export, a request containing your access token is sent to a Cloudflare Worker operated by this project to enforce fair-use limits. The worker does not store your reward data; it records a timestamp and rate-limit identifier to track export usage, and stores an anonymised GoMining user identifier solely to count unique users for the publicly displayed user counter. This identifier is not linked to your name, email, or reward data.
privacy.externalItem2: GoMining API: fetches your reward records using your access token. Subject to GoMining's own privacy policy.
privacy.externalItem3: CoinGecko API: retrieves historical BTC prices for fiat value enrichment. No personal data is sent; only date ranges are queried.
privacy.externalItem4: Exchange rate APIs: used to retrieve fiat exchange rates for currency conversion. No personal data is sent; only currency codes are queried.
privacy.sharedRecordsP1: If you choose to use the share feature, RewardTrackr will create a JSON snapshot containing only the data you explicitly select and publish it as a JSON file in a public GitHub repository. A unique shareable link is then generated, which can be used to view that snapshot inside the RewardTrackr app.
privacy.sharedRecordsP2: Anyone with the share link can access the shared snapshot. Because the underlying repository is public, shared snapshots may also be discoverable by others or indexed by third parties.
privacy.sharedRecordsP3: Shared snapshots can be deleted at any time using the delete option in the share feature, which removes the JSON file from the public repository. However, copies, forks, caches, or previously accessed versions may remain available elsewhere.
privacy.sharedRecordsP4: Only data you explicitly choose to share is included. You should only share information you are comfortable making public.
privacy.contactP1: Questions about privacy can be directed to the project maintainer through

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.acceptanceP1: By using RewardTrackr you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the tool.
terms.unofficialP1: RewardTrackr is an independent, community-built tool. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to GoMining or any of its related entities. Use of the GoMining API through this tool is subject to GoMining's own terms of service.
terms.noWarrantyP1: RewardTrackr is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. The author makes no guarantees regarding the accuracy, completeness, or availability of the tool or the data it retrieves. Exported data should be independently verified before being used for tax, financial, or legal purposes.
terms.noAdviceP1: RewardTrackr does not provide tax, financial, accounting, or legal advice. Any data exported by this tool is for informational purposes only. Consult a qualified professional for guidance on your specific situation.
terms.apiDependencyP1: RewardTrackr depends on third-party APIs, including the GoMining API, CoinGecko, and exchange rate providers, which may change, become unavailable, or impose rate limits without notice. The author is not responsible for any disruptions caused by changes to these external services.
terms.fairUseP1: RewardTrackr enforces a fair-use export limit (currently 3 exports per day) to protect the service for all users. This limit is tracked via the rate-limit service described in the Privacy Policy. The author reserves the right to adjust these limits at any time, with or without prior notice, at its sole discretion.
terms.responsibilityP1: You are solely responsible for keeping your GoMining API access token secure. Do not share your token with others. RewardTrackr stores it temporarily in your browser session (sessionStorage) and uses it only to make API requests on your behalf.
terms.responsibilityP2: You agree not to use RewardTrackr in any way that violates GoMining's terms of service or applicable law.
terms.liabilityP1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, the author of RewardTrackr shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the tool, including but not limited to data loss, export errors, or API changes, restrictions, or service interruptions by third-party providers.
terms.changesP1: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of RewardTrackr after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.governingLawP1: These terms shall be governed by the laws of Portugal.
